creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Olivier Duchateau from comment #2)
> (In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #1)
> 
> In my 4.13 branch (for 2.1.4 release), I have also a patch [1], which fixes
> warnings (need to be reviewed by upstream).
> 
> [1]
> https://app.assembla.com/spaces/xfce4/subversion/source/HEAD/tags/4.13/x11/
> xfce4-whiskermenu-plugin/files/patch-panel-plugin_launcher.h

As far as I can see that object is always used as a class and its definition too looks more like a class than a struct, so it looks correct to me.

Thanks!
